description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6.6.0 Docker image and defines a single deploy stage. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs the commands: mkdir .public, mkdir .public/assets, cp -r assets/* .public/assets, and mv .public public. Configure the job to publish the public directory as a Pages artifact and to run only on the master branch. Ensure no additional services, caches, or variables are defined.
